[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011111 5
1 10011110 5
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 10110100 4
6 01100110 4
7 01101010 4
